title: Kidplokio Kids School Backpack Critter Panda Face for Children
description:
The Kidplokio Critter Panda kids backpack is the perfect back to school backpack for girls and animal lovers! It features one large compartment and one small compartment on the front for storing school supplies and accessories. The main compartment measures 16” x 11” x 3”, so your child will easily be able to bring their books and school supplies to and from school. The small compartment measures 10” in diameter and features a cute panda face with sparkly ears for a fun look. Our Kidplokio backpack is constructed of durable water-resistant canvas, so your child can protect their books and supplies rain or shine. It features 2 sturdy zip closures and a top carry handle with reinforced stitching so it can easily be hung in a cubby or closet when not in use
